---
title: "optalg/egyebek"
listing:
  id: lista
  contents:
    - "uj/*"
    - "regi/*"
    - "task1/*"
    - "task2/*"
  categories: true
  type: table # Lehet 'default', 'grid' vagy 'table' is
  fields: [filename, categories] # Megadhatod, mi jelenjen meg
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 222
---


::: {#lista}
:::
